ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the game belongs to */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date when the game was played */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Name of the opponent team */,
  "score" TEXT /* Final score of the game */,
  "game_result" TEXT /* Result of the game (win or loss) */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (regular season, playoff, tournament) */,
  "home_away" TEXT /* Location of the game (home or away) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player on the team */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birthdate of the player */,
  "hometown" TEXT /* Hometown of the player */,
  "high_school" TEXT /* High school of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_position FOREIGN KEY ("position") REFERENCES player_positions ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game statistic entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistic is for */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic is for */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Number of minutes the player played in the game */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Number of field goals made by the player */,
  "field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of field goals made */,
  "three_pointers_made" INTEGER /* Number of three-pointers made by the player */,
  "three_point_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of three-pointers made */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Number of free throws made by the player */,
  "free_throw_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of free throws made */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the player in the game */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Number of rebounds by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the player */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Number of steals by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks by the player */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Number of turnovers by the player */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus/minus rating of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "opponents" (
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each opponent */,
  "opponent_name" TEXT /* Name of the opponent team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the opponent team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference affiliation of the opponent team */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division affiliation of the opponent team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opponent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the player position */,
  "position_description" TEXT /* Description of the player position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" TEXT /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "championship_won" INTEGER /* Whether the team won a championship in that season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_opponents" (
  "game_opponent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game-opponent association */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent */,
  "game_opponent_result" TEXT /* Result of the game against the opponent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_opponent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_opponents_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES opponents ("opponent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_opponents_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
